overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The player approaches a parked Delamain taxi while pedestrians navigate the wet sidewalks, with large digital billboards and futuristic architecture dominating the cyberpunk urban environment.

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-slicked sidewalk toward a parked vehicle and group of pedestrians

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying '2nd AMENDMENT' with firearm advertisement and animated graphics
tall skyscrapers with colorful neon signs including green and red corporate logos
futuristic black taxi with distinctive white checkered pattern and illuminated trim
rain-slicked pavement reflecting neon lights and street illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy Night City street at night, with the character walking along a wet sidewalk. A prominent digital billboard advertising the '2nd Amendment' dominates the left side while neon-lit skyscrapers rise in the background. The character approaches a parked black checkered taxi and a group of pedestrians walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded sidewalk section near parked Delamain taxi

events.description: character navigates around the parked black checkered taxi while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: navigating closely around the parked vehicle while moving through pedestrian traffic on the narrow sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking alongside the character near the parked vehicle

entered.detail: elevated highway structure with red and blue neon accent lighting visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: The character moves alongside the parked Delamain taxi, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic. The large billboard falls behind as the character progresses, while distant neon-lit infrastructure becomes visible through the rainy atmosphere. Pedestrians in futuristic attire walk alongside the character on the cramped sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk continuing past the vehicle

agents.ego_description: continuing down the neon-lit sidewalk past the parked vehicle with fewer pedestrians nearby

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the taxi, which now recedes into the background on the left. The sidewalk opens up slightly with fewer pedestrians immediately nearby. The persistent rain continues to reflect the vibrant neon lights from the surrounding cyberpunk architecture as the character maintains a steady walking pace down the city street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rainy, neon-lit sidewalk that transitions from a crowded urban corridor into a more open stretch of the city street. It begins with the character walking past a towering digital billboard advertising the 2nd Amendment, while futuristic skyscrapers loom through the rainy atmosphere. As the character progresses, the camera moves alongside a parked black checkered Delamain taxi and navigates through a flow of pedestrians in futuristic attire. The scene then shifts as the billboard and taxi recede into the background, allowing the sidewalk to open up with fewer people nearby. Finally, the camera maintains a steady pace forward, capturing the persistent rain reflecting the vibrant neon lights of the surrounding cyberpunk architecture.
